message:
🌱 Add crossplane: Allow deterministic Composite Resource Names mission (#1644)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "crossplane-3120-allow-deterministic-composite-resource-names",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "crossplane: Allow deterministic Composite Resource Names",
+    "description": "Allow deterministic Composite Resource Names. Requested by 14+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current crossplane deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your crossplane version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nhelm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working crossplane installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review crossplane configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane\n```\n### What problem are you facing?\n\nCrossplane composite resource names are generated by the kube API server through setting `generatedName` to `<claim-name>-`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow deterministic Composite Resource Names",
+        "description": "Can this issue be addressed by remembering to set `crossplane.io/external-name` annotations on the managed resources that are derived from something deterministic (e.g. the claim name, or some formatting thereof)?\n\nI think I'm almost following you here, but an example would help. It sounds like\n```yaml\nIf the name is too long, it is trimmed:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow deterministic Composite Resource Names\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Can this issue be addressed by remembering to set `crossplane.io/external-name` annotations on the managed resources that are derived from something deterministic (e.g. the claim name, or some formatting thereof)?\n\nI think I'm almost following you here, but an example would help.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "If the name is too long, it is trimmed:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "crossplane",
+      "graduated",

+    },

+  },
